summary: Tested expanded Jasper Response Letters feature. All backend API tests passed (17/17). Frontend UI tests passed - 8 letter cards displayed in 2-column grid for housing case, cards show title/subtitle, clicking opens modal, selected card highlights blue. Regression tests passed for login and case detail page.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/letters/types/nda returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/housing returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/employment returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/debt returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/demand returns 8 letter types (NEW case type)
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/court returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/consumer returns 8 letter types with correct IDs
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/contract returns 8 letter types
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/other returns 8 letter types as fallback
Backend: Unknown case type falls back to 'other' with 8 letter types
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/immigration returns 6 letter types
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/family returns 6 letter types
Backend: POST /api/letters/generate requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/letters/generate works with housing letter type IDs
Backend: POST /api/letters/generate accepts new NDA letter type IDs
Regression: Login with email/password works (test@jasper.com/password123)
Regression: GET /api/cases/{case_id} returns case with risk_score and type
Frontend: Case detail page loads with data-testid='case-detail-page'
Frontend: 'Jasper Response Letters' section found
Frontend: 8 letter buttons displayed for housing case type
Frontend: Letter cards show title (bold) and description (gray)
Frontend: Clicking letter card opens generation modal
Frontend: Generate Letter button found in modal (data-testid='generate-letter-btn')
Frontend: 2-column grid layout (grid grid-cols-2) with 8 letter cards
Regression: Risk Score section found
Regression: Case timeline section found
Regression: Documents section found
Regression: Add document button found (data-testid='add-document-btn')
Regression: Talk to a lawyer button found (data-testid='talk-to-lawyer-btn')
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_letter_types.py (New test file for expanded letter types feature)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expanded Response Letters feature is fully implemented and working. Backend: LETTER_TYPES dictionary in server.py (lines 799-906) contains 8 letter types for nda, housing, employment, debt, demand, court, consumer, contract, other; 6 for immigration and family. Frontend: CaseDetail.js (lines 675-706) displays letter cards in 2-column grid with selected state using blue highlight (bg-[#eff6ff] border-[#1a56db] ring-1). Test file /app/backend/tests/test_letter_types.py can be reused for regression testing. New case types 'nda' and 'demand' added to doc_to_case mapping in Pass2 prompt.
